transcript:
CALLER: Hi uh, I'm calling to fix an appointment. Gynaecology, if you have that.
AGENT: Yes, we do have a gynaecology department. May I know your name?
CALLER: Priya Jain.
AGENT: And your contact number, Priya?
CALLER: 9654321789.
AGENT: Thank you. Dr. Kavitha Reddy handles gynaecology here. She has openings on Friday afternoon — 2 PM, 3:30 PM, or 4:30 PM.
CALLER: Umm, let me think... 3:30 PM, that should be fine.
AGENT: Great. Booked for Priya Jain, Friday at 3:30 PM with Dr. Kavitha Reddy. Confirmation will be sent to your number.
CALLER: Perfect, thanks.
